headline: Warsh may get green light to hike rates
detail: Speculation that the White House could signal support for rate hikes is a direct headwind for high-multiple tech and chip stocks. Your book is ~90% in exactly those names — PLTR, AVGO, CRWD, SMH all reprice lower when rate expectations rise. On margin, a broad de-rating in tech hits your equity hard and fast.

headline: Cerebras CEO walks back margin forecast after stock plummets
detail: A high-profile AI chip adjacent name getting punished for guidance confusion is a sentiment warning for the whole AI/chip space. AVGO and SMH are your most direct exposures here. When investors lose confidence in AI infrastructure earnings visibility, these names sell off together regardless of their own fundamentals.
